object: at least one controller's identity and contact details
core_sentence: The DPA shall contain at least one controller's identity and contact details.
source_text: The DPA shall contain at least one controller's identity and contact details. (LL)

object: at least one processor's identity and contact details
core_sentence: The DPA shall contain at least one processor's identity and contact details.
source_text: The DPA shall contain at least one processor's identity and contact details. (LL)

object: the duration of the processing
core_sentence: The DPA shall contain the duration of the processing.
source_text: The DPA shall contain the duration of the processing. (Art. 28(3))

object: the nature and purpose of the processing
core_sentence: The DPA shall contain the nature and purpose of the processing.
source_text: The DPA shall contain the nature and purpose of the processing. (Art. 28(3))

object: the types of personal data
core_sentence: The DPA shall contain the types of personal data.
source_text: The DPA shall contain the types of personal data. (Art. 28(3))

object: the categories of data subjects
core_sentence: The DPA shall contain the categories of data subjects.
source_text: The DPA shall contain the categories of data subjects. (Art. 28(3))

object: the organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security
core_sentence: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security can include the following items.
source_text: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security can include: (a) pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data, (b) ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services, (c) restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident, and (d) regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing. (Art. 32(1))

object: pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data
core_sentence: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security include pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data.
source_text: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security can include: (a) pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data, (b) ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services, (c) restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident, and (d) regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing. (Art. 32(1))

object: ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services
core_sentence: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security include ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services.
source_text: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security can include: (a) pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data, (b) ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services, (c) restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident, and (d) regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing. (Art. 32(1))

object: restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident
condition: in the event of a physical or technical incident
core_sentence: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security include restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident.
source_text: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security can include: (a) pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data, (b) ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services, (c) restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident, and (d) regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing. (Art. 32(1))

object: regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing
core_sentence: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security include regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing.
source_text: The organizational and technical measures to ensure a level of security can include: (a) pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data, (b) ensure confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services, (c) restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident, and (d) regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing. (Art. 32(1))

actor: The notification of personal data breach
object: the nature of personal data breach; the name and contact details of the data protection officer; the consequences of the breach; the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects
core_sentence: The notification of personal data breach shall include the nature of personal data breach; the name and contact details of the data protection officer; the consequences of the breach; the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects.
source_text: The notification of personal data breach shall at least include (a) the nature of personal data breach; (b) the name and contact details of the data protection officer; (c) the consequences of the breach; (d) the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects. (Art. 33(3))

actor: The notification of personal data breach
object: the nature of personal data breach
core_sentence: The notification of personal data breach shall include the nature of personal data breach.
source_text: The notification of personal data breach shall at least include (a) the nature of personal data breach; (b) the name and contact details of the data protection officer; (c) the consequences of the breach; (d) the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects. (Art. 33(3))

actor: The notification of personal data breach
object: the name and contact details of the data protection officer
core_sentence: The notification of personal data breach shall include the name and contact details of the data protection officer.
source_text: The notification of personal data breach shall at least include (a) the nature of personal data breach; (b) the name and contact details of the data protection officer; (c) the consequences of the breach; (d) the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects. (Art. 33(3))

actor: The notification of personal data breach
object: the consequences of the breach
core_sentence: The notification of personal data breach shall include the consequences of the breach.
source_text: The notification of personal data breach shall at least include (a) the nature of personal data breach; (b) the name and contact details of the data protection officer; (c) the consequences of the breach; (d) the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects. (Art. 33(3))

actor: The notification of personal data breach
object: the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects
core_sentence: The notification of personal data breach shall include the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects.
source_text: The notification of personal data breach shall at least include (a) the nature of personal data breach; (b) the name and contact details of the data protection officer; (c) the consequences of the breach; (d) the measures taken or proposed to mitigate its effects. (Art. 33(3))

object: the following: (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks
core_sentence: The DPIA shall include the following: (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks.
source_text: The DPIA shall at least include (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks. (Art. 35(7))

object: a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing
core_sentence: The DPIA shall include a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing.
source_text: The DPIA shall at least include (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks. (Art. 35(7))

object: an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes
core_sentence: The DPIA shall include an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes.
source_text: The DPIA shall at least include (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks. (Art. 35(7))

object: an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects
core_sentence: The DPIA shall include an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects.
source_text: The DPIA shall at least include (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks. (Art. 35(7))

object: the measures envisaged to address the risks
core_sentence: The DPIA shall include the measures envisaged to address the risks.
source_text: The DPIA shall at least include (a) a systematic description of the envisaged processing operations and the purposes of the processing, (b) an assessment of the necessity and proportionality of the processing operations in relation to the purposes, (c) an assessment of the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, and (d) the measures envisaged to address the risks. (Art. 35(7))

object: a sub-processor
condition: without a prior specific or general written authorization of the controller
core_sentence: The processor shall not engage a sub-processor.
source_text: The processor shall not engage a sub-processor without a prior specific or general written authorization of the controller. (Art. 28(2))

object: any intended changes concerning the addition or replacement of sub-processors
condition: In case of general written authorization
core_sentence: The processor shall inform the controller of any intended changes concerning the addition or replacement of sub-processors.
source_text: In case of general written authorization, the processor shall inform the controller of any intended changes concerning the addition or replacement of sub-processors. (Art. 28(2))

object: personal data
manner: on documented instructions from the controller
core_sentence: The processor shall process personal data.
source_text: The processor shall process personal data on documented instructions from the controller. (Art. 28(3a))

object: personal data
condition: if required by Union or Member State law
core_sentence: The processor can process personal data.
source_text: The processor can process personal data without documented instructions, if required by Union or Member State law. (Art. 28(3a))

object: that legal requirement
condition: if law does not prohibit informing the controller on grounds of public interest
core_sentence: The processor shall inform the controller of that legal requirement.
source_text: The processor shall inform the controller of that legal requirement before processing, if law does not prohibit informing the controller on grounds of public interest. (Art. 28(3a))

object: that persons authorized to process personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality or are under an appropriate statutory obligation of confidentiality
core_sentence: The processor shall ensure that persons authorized to process personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality or are under an appropriate statutory obligation of confidentiality.
source_text: The processor shall ensure that persons authorized to process personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality or are under an appropriate statutory obligation of confidentiality. (Art. 28(3b))

object: all measures required pursuant to Article 32 or to ensure the security of processing
core_sentence: The processor shall take all measures required pursuant to Article 32 or to ensure the security of processing.
source_text: The processor shall take all measures required pursuant to Article 32 or to ensure the security of processing. (Art. 28(3c))

object: the controller in fulfilling its obligation to respond to requests for exercising the data subject's rights
core_sentence: The processor shall assist the controller in fulfilling its obligation to respond to requests for exercising the data subject's rights.
source_text: The processor shall assist the controller in fulfilling its obligation to respond to requests for exercising the data subject's rights. (Art. 28(3e))
obligation_groups: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights

object: the controller in ensuring the security of processing
core_sentence: The processor shall assist the controller in ensuring the security of processing.
source_text: The processor shall assist the controller in ensuring the security of processing. (Art. 28(3f), Art. 32)
obligation_groups: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights

object: the controller in consulting the supervisory authorities prior to processing
condition: where the processing would result in a high risk in the absence of measures taken by the controller to mitigate the risk
core_sentence: The processor shall assist the controller in consulting the supervisory authorities prior to processing.
source_text: The processor shall assist the controller in consulting the supervisory authorities prior to processing where the processing would result in a high risk in the absence of measures taken by the controller to mitigate the risk. (Art. 28(3f), Art.36)
obligation_groups: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights

object: the controller in notifying a personal data breach
core_sentence: The processor shall assist the controller in notifying a personal data breach to the supervisory authority.
source_text: The processor shall assist the controller in notifying a personal data breach to the supervisory authority. (Art. 28(3f), Art.33)
obligation_groups: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights

object: the controller in communicating a personal data breach
core_sentence: The processor shall assist the controller in communicating a personal data breach to the data subject.
source_text: The processor shall assist the controller in communicating a personal data breach to the data subject. (Art. 28(3f), Art.34)
obligation_groups: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights

object: the controller in ensuring compliance with the obligations pursuant to data protection impact assessment (DPIA)
core_sentence: The processor shall assist the controller in ensuring compliance with the obligations pursuant to data protection impact assessment (DPIA).
source_text: The processor shall assist the controller in ensuring compliance with the obligations pursuant to data protection impact assessment (DPIA). (Art. 28(3f), Art.35)
obligation_groups: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights

object: all personal data
condition: after the end of the provision of services relating to processing
core_sentence: The processor shall return or delete all personal data to the controller.
source_text: The processor shall return or delete all personal data to the controller after the end of the provision of services relating to processing. (Art. 28(3g))
obligation_groups: Data Return Deletion And Post-Termination Handling

object: the controller
condition: if an instruction infringes the GDPR or other data protection provisions
core_sentence: The processor shall inform the controller.
source_text: The processor shall immediately inform the controller if an instruction infringes the GDPR or other data protection provisions. (Art. 28(3h))

object: information necessary to demonstrate compliance with the obligations Article 28 in GDPR
core_sentence: The processor shall make available information necessary to demonstrate compliance with the obligations Article 28 in GDPR to the controller.
source_text: The processor shall make available to the controller information necessary to demonstrate compliance with the obligations Article 28 in GDPR. (Art. 28(3h))

object: audits, including inspections
core_sentence: The processor shall allow for and contribute to audits, including inspections.
source_text: The processor shall allow for and contribute to audits, including inspections, conducted by the controller or another auditor mandated by the controller. (Art. 28(3h))

object: the same obligations referred to in Article 28(3) in GDPR
manner: by way of contract or other legal act under Union or Member State law
core_sentence: The processor shall impose the same obligations referred to in Article 28(3) in GDPR on the engaged sub-processors.
source_text: The processor shall impose the same obligations referred to in Article 28(3) in GDPR on the engaged sub-processors by way of contract or other legal act under Union or Member State law. (Art. 28(4))

object: for the performance of sub-processor's obligations
core_sentence: The processor shall remain fully liable for the performance of sub-processor's obligations to the controller.
source_text: The processor shall remain fully liable to the controller for the performance of sub-processor's obligations. (Art. 28(4))

object: the risk of accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alternation, unauthorized disclosure of or access to the personal data transmitted, stored or processed
condition: When assessing the level of security
core_sentence: The processor shall take into account the risk of accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alternation, unauthorized disclosure of or access to the personal data transmitted, stored or processed.
source_text: When assessing the level of security, the processor shall take into account the risk of accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alternation, unauthorized disclosure of or access to the personal data transmitted, stored or processed. (Art. 32(2))

object: personal data
recipient: a third country or international organization
condition: without a prior specific or general authorization of the controller
core_sentence: The processor shall not transfer personal data to a third country or international organization.
source_text: The processor shall not transfer personal data to a third country or international organization without a prior specific or general authorization of the controller. (Art. 28(3a))

object: guarantees to Article 28 (1--4)
manner: through adherence to an approved codes of conduct or an approved certification mechanism
core_sentence: The processor can demonstrate guarantees to Article 28 (1--4).
source_text: The processor can demonstrate guarantees to Article 28 (1--4) through adherence to an approved codes of conduct or an approved certification mechanism. (Art. 28(5))

object: appropriate technical and organisational measures
manner: to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk of varying likelihood and severity for the rights and freedoms of natural persons
core_sentence: The processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures.
source_text: The processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk of varying likelihood and severity for the rights and freedoms of natural persons. (Art. 32(1))

object: that any natural person acting under its authority who has access to personal data only process them on instructions from the controller
core_sentence: The processor shall ensure that any natural person acting under its authority who has access to personal data only process them on instructions from the controller.
source_text: The processor shall ensure that any natural person acting under its authority who has access to personal data only process them on instructions from the controller. (Art. 32(4))

object: the controller of a personal data breach
condition: after becoming aware of a personal data breach
core_sentence: The processor shall notify the controller of a personal data breach.
source_text: The processor shall notify the controller without undue delay after becoming aware of a personal data breach. (Art. 33(2))

object: the damage caused by processing
condition: only where it has not complied with obligations of the GDPR specifically directed to processors or where it has acted outside or contrary to lawful instructions of the controller
core_sentence: A processor shall be liable for the damage caused by processing.
source_text: A processor shall be liable for the damage caused by processing only where it has not complied with obligations of the GDPR specifically directed to processors or where it has acted outside or contrary to lawful instructions of the controller. (Art. 82(2))

object: changes concerning the addition or replacement of sub-processors
condition: In case of general written authorization
timing: after having been informed of such intended changes by the processor
core_sentence: In case of general written authorization, the controller shall have the right to object to changes concerning the addition or replacement of sub-processors.
source_text: In case of general written authorization, the controller shall have the right to object to changes concerning the addition or replacement of sub-processors, after having been informed of such intended changes by the processor. (Art. 28(2))

object: the processing
core_sentence: The controller shall have the right to suspend the processing.
source_text: The controller shall have the right to suspend the processing in certain cases. (LL)

object: the DPA
core_sentence: The controller shall have the right to terminate the DPA.
source_text: The controller shall have the right to terminate the DPA in certain cases. (LL)

object: the personal data breach
timing: no later than 72 hours after having become aware of it
core_sentence: The controller shall notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority.
source_text: The controller shall, no later than 72 hours after having become aware of it, notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority. (Art. 33(1))

object: the personal breaches
core_sentence: The controller shall document the personal breaches.
source_text: The controller shall document the personal breaches. (Art. 33(5))

object: the data breach
core_sentence: The controller shall communicate the data breach to the data subject.
source_text: In case of high risks, the controller shall communicate the data breach to the data subject without undue delay. (Art. 34(1))

object: DPIA
core_sentence: The controller shall carry out DPIA.
source_text: The controller shall carry out DPIA. (Art. 35(1))

object: the DPO
core_sentence: The controller shall seek advice of the DPO.
source_text: The controller shall seek advice of the DPO when carrying DPIA. (Art. 35(2))

object: the views of data subjects or their representatives
core_sentence: The controller shall seek the views of data subjects or their representatives.
source_text: The controller shall seek the views of data subjects or their representatives on the intended processing. (Art. 35(9))

object: a review to assess if processing is performed in accordance with the data protection impact assessment
condition: when there is a change of the risk represented by processing operations
core_sentence: The controller shall carry out a review to assess if processing is performed in accordance with the data protection impact assessment.
source_text: The controller shall carry out a review to assess if processing is performed in accordance with the data protection impact assessment at least when there is a change of the risk represented by processing operations. (Art. 35(11)

object: the damage caused by processing which infringes the GDPR
core_sentence: Any controller involved in processing shall be liable for the damage caused by processing which infringes the GDPR.
source_text: Any controller involved in processing shall be liable for the damage caused by processing which infringes the GDPR. (Art. 82(2))
